tasks.details: Generate shadow and noise textures into common/shadow and common/noise
tasks.notes: Generated runtime texture set for shadow/noise: shadow/shadow_01.png, noise/metal_noise_256.png, noise/paper_noise_256.png.

tasks.details: Update lobby-main-default to use nav_ink button-skin
tasks.notes: Updated assets/resources/ui-spec/skins/lobby-main-default.json: added family slot ui-common-ink.nav.primary and converted lobby.nav.btn from color to button-skin using nav_ink btn_primary_{normal,pressed,disabled} with border [20,20,20,20].

tasks.details: Update duel-challenge-default to use paper_utility for reject/utility buttons
tasks.notes: Updated assets/resources/ui-spec/skins/duel-challenge-default.json: added family slot ui-common-paper.utility.primary and converted duel.btn.reject from color to button-skin using paper_utility btn_primary_{normal,pressed,disabled} with border [20,20,20,20].

tasks.details: Add parchment color and shadow tokens for light-surface UI families
tasks.notes: Updated assets/resources/ui-spec/ui-design-tokens.json with surfaceParchmentFill, textOnParchment, dividerOnParchment, shadowDefault.

tasks.details: Align duel.btn.accept to ui-common-metal.equipment.primary for duel-challenge mixed-family target
tasks.notes: Updated assets/resources/ui-spec/skins/duel-challenge-default.json: added ui-common-metal.equipment.primary and converted duel.btn.accept to equipment button-skin using btn_primary_{normal,pressed,disabled} with border [20,20,20,20].

tasks.details: Add light-surface label variants with outline disabled
tasks.notes: Added bodyOnParchment / labelOnParchment presets and wired UISkinResolver to read typography presets via label-style.style.

tasks.details: Add selected state support for button-skin with normal fallback
tasks.notes: Updated UISpecTypes, UISkinResolver, and UIPreviewBuilder. button-skin now accepts selected, caches a selected fallback, and exposes setButtonVisualState() for panels.

tasks.details: Validate all shared button family sprites use border [20,20,20,20] and remain compatible with current button heights
tasks.notes: Added tools_node/validate-button-family-borders.js and integrated it into tools_node/run-acceptance.js. Current shared family usages pass border [20,20,20,20] validation with validatedSlots=6.

tasks.details: Define reusable common-parchment skin fragment for light-surface panels

tasks.details: Prepare and execute lobby-main nav.ink plus shadow screenshot comparison package against reference screenshots.
tasks.notes: 2026-03-31 opened Agent2 Phase D QA card and prepared artifacts/ui-qa/UI-1-0014/. UI-2-0018 is now complete: canonical preview route is assets/scenes/LoadingScene.scene -> LoadingScene.ts root component -> previewMode=true -> previewTarget=LobbyMain. 2026-03-31 Agent2 resumed D-1 after confirming `http://localhost:7456` is reachable again, but autonomous capture is still blocked because the repo lacks a stable, reproducible headless preview screenshot pipeline. Follow-up tooling card UI-2-0023 was opened for Agent1.

tasks.details: Prepare multi-screen paper.utility QA package for shop-main and gacha, focusing on cross-screen consistency.
tasks.notes: 2026-03-31 opened Agent2 Phase D QA card. UI-2-0018 is complete and preview entry now exists via LoadingScene.ts + UIScreenPreviewHost.ts. UI-2-0019 formally re-scoped D-2 to common-parchment / light-surface carrier consistency, and UI-2-0020 wired shared QA anchors into shop-main and gacha. 2026-03-31 Agent2 captured ShopMain successfully via headless preview. Agent1 then completed UI-2-0025 by routing Gacha preview through `gacha-main-screen` + `gacha-preview-main`, so Agent2 can now capture both ShopMain and Gacha and proceed to formal D-2 comparison notes.

tasks.details: Prepare duel-challenge mixed-family QA package to confirm reject equals paper.utility and accept equals equipment.primary.
tasks.notes: 2026-03-31 opened Agent2 Phase D QA card. UI-2-0018 is now complete: canonical preview route is assets/scenes/LoadingScene.scene -> LoadingScene.ts root component -> previewMode=true -> previewTarget=DuelChallenge. 2026-03-31 Agent2 verified the new headless capture pipeline can successfully export DuelChallenge.png, so D-3 can now proceed with formal comparison notes instead of relying on legacy DuelChallengePanel.ts buildUI().

tasks.title: Fix general-detail-default 5 missing bleed slots
tasks.description: validate-skin-contracts.js found 5 R2 FAILs in general-detail-default.json: detail.summary.card/tab.idle/tab.active/tree.node/action all missing bleed slots.
tasks.notes: 2026-03-31 fixed five missing bleed slots in general-detail-default.json, then reran node tools_node/validate-skin-contracts.js and node tools_node/run-acceptance.js successfully. Contract validation returned 29/29 PASS.

tasks.title: Add screen-driven preview hosts for D-stage QA screens
tasks.description: Provide real UISpecLoader.loadFullScreen(...) entry points for lobby-main, shop-main, gacha, and duel-challenge so Agent2 can capture trustworthy D-1~D-3 screenshots.
tasks.notes: 2026-03-31 completed. Added assets/scripts/ui/components/UIScreenPreviewHost.ts and extended assets/scripts/ui/scenes/LoadingScene.ts with previewMode + previewTarget enum. Canonical preview route for Agent2 is assets/scenes/LoadingScene.scene -> LoadingScene.ts root component -> previewMode=true -> previewTarget={LobbyMain,ShopMain,Gacha,DuelChallenge}. Project now has explicit loadFullScreen('lobby-main-screen'|'shop-main-screen'|'gacha-screen'|'duel-challenge-screen') entry points and D-1~D-3 are unblocked.

tasks.title: Align D-2 target family between docs and shop/gacha skins
tasks.description: Reconcile the D-2 QA target (paper.utility) with the actual shop-main / gacha skin implementations, which currently point to commerce/color and common-parchment patterns.
tasks.notes: 2026-03-31 completed. D-2 is formally re-scoped from paper.utility button consistency to common-parchment / light-surface carrier consistency. Rationale: paper.utility remains valid for duel-challenge utility actions, but current shop-main-default and gacha-default do not share that button family. Follow-up implementation task UI-2-0020 was opened to wire a real shared light-surface carrier into shop-main and gacha before Agent2 runs D-2 QA.

tasks.title: Wire shared light-surface carriers into shop-main and gacha
tasks.description: Expose a real common-parchment/light-surface carrier in shop-main and gacha so D-2 can evaluate cross-screen surface consistency instead of placeholder color blocks.
tasks.notes: shop-main-default.json v5: added shop.content.carrier QA anchor slot. gacha-default.json v3: added gacha.pity.carrier.bg/frame slots. gacha-main.json v2: PityInfoBar now has skinSlot=gacha.pity.carrier.bg. D-2 unblocked. acceptance all green.

tasks.title: Fix PreviewInEditor SpriteFrame resource index drift
tasks.description: Investigate and fix PreviewInEditor failures where existing SpriteFrame assets under assets/resources/sprites/ui_families/* cannot be resolved from the resources bundle.
tasks.notes: 2026-03-31 Agent2 opened this card after PreviewInEditor reported `Bundle resources doesn't contain .../spriteFrame` for shadow_01, metal_noise_256, equipment/btn_primary_normal, and multiple general_detail sprites. File audit confirmed the PNG and .meta files already exist under assets/resources/sprites/ui_families/..., so this is currently treated as an Agent1-side resource index / path normalization / editor refresh contract issue rather than a missing-art asset task. 2026-03-31 Agent1 completed the fix by normalizing resource paths in ResourceManager, retrying SpriteFrame candidates before Texture2D fallback, releasing single SpriteFrame cache keys correctly, adding tools_node/validate-representative-spriteframe-assets.js into acceptance, and running asset-db refresh successfully.

tasks.title: Upgrade general-list from placeholder table to framed lobby skin
tasks.description: Replace the remaining color-rect/placeholder presentation in general-list with proper 9-slice background and framed header/list/row styling using existing lobby/common panel families.
tasks.notes: general-list-default.json v5: header.bg ??dark_metal/frame 9-slice; list.bg ??parchment/bg 9-slice (opacity=0.6); row.bg ??dark_metal/bg 9-slice; header label color ??#D4AF37 gold. acceptance all green.

tasks.title: Provide reproducible headless preview capture for D-stage QA
tasks.description: Add a stable CLI/headless capture workflow for LoadingScene.previewTarget-based screen QA so Agent2 can generate D-1~D-3 artifacts without manual Inspector interaction.
tasks.notes: 2026-03-31 Agent1 hardened the capture pipeline: LoadingScene now supports query/localStorage preview injection and publishes __UI_CAPTURE_STATE__ (loading/ready/error); tools_node/capture-ui-screens.js is now a puppeteer-core headless CLI, auto-injects LoadingScene.scene uuid, writes debug screenshot/state artifacts on failure, triggers asset-db refresh before capture, retries refreshable preview failures, and uses domcontentloaded instead of networkidle2 for the Cocos Editor preview page. 2026-03-31 Agent2 confirmed reproducible screenshot export for LobbyMain, ShopMain, DuelChallenge, and Gacha under artifacts/ui-qa/UI-2-0023/. The remaining Gacha compatibility work was completed under UI-2-0025, so UI-2-0023 is now fully closed as tooling-complete.

tasks.title: Align gacha-screen with UIScreenPreviewHost loadFullScreen contract
tasks.description: Refactor assets/resources/ui-spec/screens/gacha-screen.json from the legacy multi-screen schema to the single-screen loadFullScreen contract expected by UIScreenPreviewHost and LoadingScene.previewTarget=Gacha.
tasks.notes: 2026-03-31 Agent2 validated the headless capture pipeline by exporting LobbyMain, ShopMain, and DuelChallenge. Agent1 then finished the Gacha preview compatibility path by adding `assets/resources/ui-spec/layouts/gacha-preview-main.json`, pointing `gacha-main-screen.json` to that preview-safe layout, and aligning `LoadingScene.previewTarget=Gacha` plus `tools_node/capture-ui-screens.js` to use `gacha-main-screen` as the canonical preview contract. `node tools_node/capture-ui-screens.js --target Gacha` now succeeds and exports `artifacts/ui-qa/UI-2-0023/Gacha.png`.

tasks.title: Split UIPreviewBuilder into helper modules to reduce encoding and merge risk
tasks.description: Break UIPreviewBuilder into smaller orchestration/text/diagnostics/layout/style modules after the current encoding repair stabilizes, without changing runtime behavior.
tasks.notes: 2026-03-31 Phase 1 completed: (1) Created UIPreviewDiagnostics.ts with 13 diagnostic methods centralizing all console calls; (2) Created UIPreviewTextCatalog.ts centralizing Chinese strings and JSDoc; (3) Updated UIPreviewBuilder.ts to route all console.log/warn/error through UIPreviewDiagnostics; (4) Verified zero direct console calls remain in UIPreviewBuilder.ts; (5) All changes are pure refactoring, runtime behavior unchanged. Next phase: Layout & Style helper extraction.
